name: Loop Demo - Image Resizer
description: Demonstrates loop functionality by resizing multiple images in parallel

input.description: Array of image URLs to process

stages.name: resize-image
command: apk add --no-cache imagemagick curl >/dev/null 2>&1 && curl -sL "{{loop.imageUrl}}" -o /tmp/input.jpg && convert /tmp/input.jpg -resize {{vars.outputWidth}}x{{vars.outputHeight}} /data/resized-{{loop.i}}.jpg && echo "Resized image {{loop.i}}"
